data.description:
## Summary

Write failing (RED) tests for the FILE_IMPACT event type and associated state fields before any implementation exists.

## testing_mode
RED

## Story
2985-f04d — Add FILE_IMPACT event type to ticket-lib.sh and reducer

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-write-commit-event.sh
- .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria

### Python tests (tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py)
- [ ] test_file_impact_event_compiles_to_state: Given a CREATE event followed by FILE_IMPACT event with file_impact list, When reduce_ticket runs, Then state['file_impact'] == that list
- [ ] test_file_impact_latest_wins_semantics: Given two FILE_IMPACT events, When reduce_ticket runs, Then state['file_impact'] reflects the second (latest) event's list
- [ ] test_file_impact_missing_key_returns_empty_list: Given FILE_IMPACT event with no file_impact key in data, When reduce_ticket runs, Then state['file_impact'] == []
- [ ] test_file_impact_null_value_returns_empty_list: Given FILE_IMPACT event with file_impact: null in data, When reduce_ticket runs, Then state['file_impact'] == []
- [ ] test_file_impact_field_in_initial_state: make_initial_state() returns dict with 'file_impact' key == []
- [ ] test_file_impact_field_in_error_dict: make_error_dict() returns dict with 'file_impact' key == []

### Bash test (tests/scripts/test-ticket-write-commit-event.sh)
- [ ] test_write_commit_event_accepts_file_impact: Given write_commit_event called with FILE_IMPACT event_type, When the event is written, Then: event file exists with -FILE_IMPACT.json suffix, event file contains event_type=="FILE_IMPACT", event file data contains file_impact key

### .test-index RED markers
- [ ] Add marker: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/_processors.py: tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py [test_file_impact_event_compiles_to_state]
- [ ] Add marker: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/_state.py: tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py [test_file_impact_field_in_initial_state]
- [ ] Add marker: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh: tests/scripts/test-ticket-write-commit-event.sh [test_write_commit_event_accepts_file_impact]

## Done Definition
All tests exist and FAIL (RED) — no implementation changes made. .test-index RED markers added for all 3 source files. Run targeted: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py::test_file_impact_event_compiles_to_state -x (expect FAIL).
data.title: Write failing RED tests for FILE_IMPACT event type (2985-f04d)
